extraction.one_line_summary: PHILIPSEN Jasper won the sprint after PICACHO Tadej survived a late puncture at 4.5km with only 4-second GC lead.
tactical_patterns: PICACHO contested intermediate sprint for 2-second bonus despite holding GC lead, revealing extreme margin anxiety at only 2s ahead.
GANNA Filippo animated chase despite being 2s down GC, showing INEOS willingness to work when minimal time gaps exist.
Alpha-Fenix prioritized green jersey intermediate points over stage positioning, suggesting team already conceded GC by stage 5.

rider_signals.PICACHO Tadej: positive: survived 4.5km-to-go puncture with only 4s GC lead through swift bike change without panic
rider_signals.GANNA Filippo: positive: led chasing throughout day after major climbing effort on Jebel Jais, unexpectedly fresh for 80kg+ rider
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: positive: won sprint and dominated intermediate points competition while finishing 10th in time trial, unusual range
rider_signals.CAVENDISH Mark: negative: mechanical and absent from sprint after crash on Jebel Jais stage, suggesting compounding physical issues
